Class AsyncUpdateBuilder<T>

java.lang.Object
dev.hogwai.dynamodb.simplified.async.AsyncUpdateBuilder<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of the item
public class AsyncUpdateBuilder<T> extends Object
Async fluent builder for updating an item in a DynamoDB table. Supports both full-item replacement and partial updates via an UpdateExpression. Part of the DynamoDB Simplified library.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    @NonNull AsyncUpdateBuilder<T>

    Configures a condition expression that gates the update operation.

    Controls whether null-valued attributes in the item are ignored during full-item replacement.

  • Method Details

    • update

      public @NonNull AsyncUpdateBuilder<T> update(@NonNull Consumer<UpdateExpression> updateBuilder)
      Defines a partial update expression (SET, REMOVE, ADD, DELETE). When set, this replaces the full-item replacement with a targeted partial update.
      Parameters:
      updateBuilder - a consumer that configures the UpdateExpression
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • condition

      public @NonNull AsyncUpdateBuilder<T> condition(@NonNull Consumer<ConditionExpression.Builder> configurator)
      Configures a condition expression that gates the update operation. DynamoDB evaluates this condition before updating the item (unlike a filter expression which applies after reading).
      Parameters:
      configurator - a consumer to build the condition expression
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • condition

      public @NonNull AsyncUpdateBuilder<T> condition(@Nullable ConditionExpression condition)
      Configures a condition expression that gates the update operation. DynamoDB evaluates this condition before updating the item (unlike a filter expression which applies after reading).
      Parameters:
      condition - the condition expression
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • ignoreNulls

      public @NonNull AsyncUpdateBuilder<T> ignoreNulls(boolean ignoreNulls)
      Controls whether null-valued attributes in the item are ignored during full-item replacement. Has no effect when using a partial update expression.
      Parameters:
      ignoreNulls - true (default) to skip null attributes, false to persist them
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • returnValues

      public @NonNull AsyncUpdateBuilder<T> returnValues(@Nullable software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.model.ReturnValue returnValues)
      Configures which item attributes to return after the update.

      When set, controls the ReturnValues parameter of the underlying UpdateItemRequest. Common values: ReturnValue.ALL_NEW (default if not set), ReturnValue.NONE, ReturnValue.ALL_OLD, ReturnValue.UPDATED_NEW, ReturnValue.UPDATED_OLD.

      Parameters:
      returnValues - the return value setting, or null to use the default
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • execute

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<Optional<T>> execute()
      Executes the update operation. If a partial update expression was configured via update(Consumer), a targeted partial update is performed via the low-level async DynamoDB client. Otherwise, the full item is replaced.
      Returns:
      a CompletableFuture containing the updated item, or empty if not found
